dashboard.title: System overview
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor users, published content, and production workload across the platform.
dashboard.loadErrorDescription: Check your connection or SUPER_ADMIN permissions, then try refreshing.

series.label: Total series
series.description: All series across every lifecycle stage

tasks.label: Total tasks
tasks.description: Assistant production workload across the system

roles.title: Role distribution
roles.description: Active accounts grouped by platform role.

users.title: Account health
users.description: Users grouped by their current access status.

series.title: Series lifecycle
series.description: Series grouped by their current business state.

tasks.title: Task progress
tasks.description: Production tasks grouped by processing state.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Search and manage Mangaka, Assistant, Editor, and Board Member accounts.

create.title: Create an Editor or Board account
create.description: Mangaka and Assistants self-register; Super Admin directly provisions publisher staff only.
create.passwordNotice: The temporary password is returned once. The user must change it on their first login.

fields.name: Full name
fields.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why the account is blocked, banned, or reactivated...

status.title: Change account status
status.description: Blocking or banning revokes current refresh tokens and notifies the user.

delete.title: Soft-delete account
delete.description: The account will be hidden from the default list and all refresh tokens will be revoked.

restore.title: Restore account
restore.description: This restores a soft-deleted account. The API does not currently return deletedAt, so use this from include-deleted mode.

resetPassword.title: Issue a temporary password
resetPassword.description: Current sessions will be revoked and the user must change the password on their next login.

temporaryPassword.label: Temporary password for {{email}}
temporaryPassword.notice: Copy it now. This password cannot be viewed again after the page reloads.

messages.passwordReset: A new temporary password was issued.

errors.validation: The submitted data is invalid. Please review it.
errors.actionFailed: The action could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.emailExists: This email address is already in use.
errors.cannotModifyAdmin: A Super Admin account cannot be modified.
errors.alreadyDeleted: This account has already been deleted.
errors.notDeleted: This account is not deleted and cannot be restored.
errors.notFound: The account could not be found.

loadError.title: Unable to load users
loadError.description: Check your connection or SUPER_ADMIN permissions and try again.

empty.title: No users found
empty.description: Change the search term or filters to see different results.

detail.errorDescription: The account does not exist or you do not have permission to view it.
detail.accountInfoDescription: The user's identity and contact information.

settings.title: System configuration
settings.subtitle: Manage runtime business parameters, Board voting rules, and reader-vote fraud protection.

app.title: Business parameters
app.description: Shared runtime thresholds; backend caches may take up to 30 seconds to refresh.

board.title: Board rules
board.description: Configure Board size, minimum quorum, and the approval majority required for decisions.
board.lockNotice: Board configuration cannot be changed while a session is ACTIVE or UPCOMING.

voting.title: Reader voting configuration
voting.description: Control OTP/CAPTCHA authentication, request limits, and anti-fraud activation conditions.

errors.validation: One or more configuration values are invalid.
errors.boardLocked: Board configuration is locked because a session is active or upcoming.
errors.notFound: The active configuration could not be found.
errors.actionFailed: The configuration could not be updated. Please try again.

loadError.title: Unable to load system configuration
loadError.description: Check your connection and SUPER_ADMIN permissions, then try again.

audit.title: System audit log
audit.subtitle: Track state transitions, administrative actions, and automated events across the platform.
audit.empty: No audit events match the current filters.

loadError.title: Unable to load the audit log
loadError.description: The filters may be invalid or the audit service is currently unavailable.
